heading: Procurement requirements for the Federal Government
label: 8504 Procurement requirements for the Federal Government
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)850441:48., ; , , .June 25, 1938, ch. 697, § 352 Stat. 1196Pub. L. 92–28, § 185 Stat. 80June 23, 1971In subsection (a), the words “referred to in ” are added for clarity because of the restatement of 41:47(a) in section 8503(a) of the revised title.section 8503 of this titleIn subsection (b), the words “for procurement” are omitted as unnecessary.

L. 92–28, § 185 Stat. 80June 23, 1971In subsection (a), the words “referred to in ” are added for clarity because of the restatement of 41:47(a) in section 8503(a) of the revised title.section 8503 of this titleIn subsection (b), the words “for procurement” are omitted as unnecessary.

children.heading: .—In General
children.label: a .—In General
children.text: An entity of the Federal Government intending to procure a product or service on the procurement list referred to in shall procure the product or service from a qualified nonprofit agency for the blind or a qualified nonprofit agency for other severely disabled in accordance with regulations of the Committee and at the price the Committee establishes if the product or service is available within the period required by the entity.section 8503 of this title

children.heading: .—Exception
children.label: b .—Exception
children.text: This section does not apply to the procurement of a product that is available from an industry established under chapter 307 of title 18 and that is required under to be procured from that industry.section 4124 of title 18
